title: Junior SEO Specialist at Dove India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Dove India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Dove India in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
